title: Stradbroke Island Research Project.pdf
summary: Maps Minjerribah's post-mining transition, local businesses, community organisations, recurring events, notable people and the Straddie Arts Trail as touchpoints for regenerative projects.

title: Roadmap for Multicultural Grant.docx
summary: Frames a Sandy Sports Club and Cultural Hub around 10-12 Ballow Road, youth support, cultural infrastructure, disaster resilience, hyperlocal media, AI training and careful grant-readiness phases.

title: Community Co-op Blueprint Development.docx
summary: Develops the Ready S.E.T. Co-operative, C-Hour, braided economy, sovereign kiosks, community wealth logic and physical hubs across Amity Point and Dunwich.

title: Sports Facility Research for Minjerribah.docx
summary: Outlines a distributed network of multi-use beach sports facilities at Dunwich, Point Lookout and Amity Point, connected to 2032 legacy, material sovereignty and local workforce retention.

title: Shared Table Initiative.md
summary: Builds the Straddie Shared Table concept around local food, producers, community cohesion, food safety, cultural alignment, public communications and measurable community benefit.

title: Straddie Noticeboard Network
summary: Adds the public_noticeboard.md idea: simple markdown notices with frontmatter can become public-safe feeds for different screens, provided consent, source checks, expiry dates, cultural care and privacy review are handled first.
